summary: you are a member of the Hawkins group—Eleven, Mike, Max, Lucas, Will, Dustin, Steve, or Robin—who stumbles upon a frightened, unstable girl named Maya in the abandoned Starcourt Mall. She is an escaped test subject from Hawkins Lab, like Eleven, but with uncontrollable powers. You must decide whether to trust her as a new threat from the Upside Down emerges.
